Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder
Enclosing class:
TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy
public static final class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder extends Object
Builder for TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.

      Parameters:
      inventory - trapped inventory result
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fluid

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder fluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Sets representative fluid for vapor-pocket and source-term handoff calculations.
      Parameters:
      fluid - configured thermodynamic fluid
      Returns:
      this builder

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder fireScenario(FireExposureScenario fireScenario)
      Sets fire exposure scenario.
      Parameters:
      fireScenario - fire exposure scenario
      Returns:
      this builder

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder material(MaterialStrengthCurve material)
      Sets material strength curve.
      Parameters:
      material - material strength curve
      Returns:
      this builder

    • api5lMaterial

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder api5lMaterial(String grade)
      Sets material from API 5L grade.
      Parameters:
      grade - API 5L grade
      Returns:
      this builder

    • pipeGeometry

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder pipeGeometry(double pipeInternalDiameterM, double wallThicknessM, double exposedLengthM)
      Sets pipe geometry in SI units.
      Parameters:
      pipeInternalDiameterM - pipe internal diameter in m
      wallThicknessM - pipe wall thickness in m
      exposedLengthM - exposed pipe length in m
      Returns:
      this builder

    • pipeGeometry

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder pipeGeometry(double pipeInternalDiameter, String diameterUnit, double wallThickness, String thicknessUnit, double exposedLength, String lengthUnit)
      Sets pipe geometry with unit conversion.
      Parameters:
      pipeInternalDiameter - pipe internal diameter value
      diameterUnit - diameter unit, one of m, mm, in, or ft
      wallThickness - wall thickness value
      thicknessUnit - thickness unit, one of m, mm, in, or ft
      exposedLength - exposed length value
      lengthUnit - length unit, one of m, mm, in, or ft
      Returns:
      this builder

    • flangeClass

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder flangeClass(int flangeClass)
      Sets ASME B16.5 flange class for flange screening.
      Parameters:
      flangeClass - pressure class, for example 150, 300, 600, 900, 1500, or 2500
      Returns:
      this builder

    • reliefSetPressure

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder reliefSetPressure(double pressure, String unit, boolean limitsPressure)
      Sets relief set pressure.
      Parameters:
      pressure - pressure value
      unit - pressure unit supported by PressureUnit
      limitsPressure - true if the relief device is assumed to limit pressure at set pressure
      Returns:
      this builder

    • timeControls

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder timeControls(double maxTimeSeconds, double timeStepSeconds)
      Sets simulation time controls.
      Parameters:
      maxTimeSeconds - maximum simulation time in s
      timeStepSeconds - time step in s
      Returns:
      this builder

    • liquidThermalProperties

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder liquidThermalProperties(double heatCapacityJPerKgK, double thermalExpansionPerK, double bulkModulusPa)
      Sets liquid thermal properties used for pressure rise.
      Parameters:
      heatCapacityJPerKgK - liquid heat capacity in J/(kg K)
      thermalExpansionPerK - liquid volumetric expansion coefficient in 1/K
      bulkModulusPa - liquid bulk modulus in Pa
      Returns:
      this builder

    • wallThermalProperties

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder wallThermalProperties(double densityKgPerM3, double heatCapacityJPerKgK, double thermalConductivityWPerMK)
      Sets wall thermal properties.
      Parameters:
      densityKgPerM3 - wall density in kg/m3
      heatCapacityJPerKgK - wall heat capacity in J/(kg K)
      thermalConductivityWPerMK - wall thermal conductivity in W/(m K)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • heatTransferCoefficients

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder heatTransferCoefficients(double innerHeatTransferCoefficientWPerM2K, double outerHeatTransferCoefficientWPerM2K)
      Sets heat transfer coefficients.
      Parameters:
      innerHeatTransferCoefficientWPerM2K - inside wall coefficient in W/(m2 K)
      outerHeatTransferCoefficientWPerM2K - outside coefficient in W/(m2 K)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • tensileStrengthFactor

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder tensileStrengthFactor(double tensileStrengthFactor)
      Sets rupture tensile-strength utilization factor.
      Parameters:
      tensileStrengthFactor - fraction of temperature-reduced tensile strength; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

    • vaporPocketDetectionEnabled

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder vaporPocketDetectionEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables vapor-pocket detection by TP flash.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to check for vapor phase during the transient
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy build()
      Builds the study.
      Returns:
      trapped-liquid fire rupture study

    • exposedAreaM2

      private double exposedAreaM2()
      Calculates exposed pipe area.
      Returns:
      exposed area in m2

    • validate

      private void validate()
      Validates builder setup.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if required input is missing
      IllegalArgumentException - if a numeric value is invalid
